retrieved_result: Beer stein "Earthenware beer steins. Beer stein ( / ˈ s t aɪ n / STYNE ), or simply stein, is an English neologism for either traditional beer mugs made out of stoneware, or specifically ornamental beer mugs that are usually sold as souvenirs or collectibles. In German, the word stein means stone and is not us
